response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no evidence of Linux kernel modification, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like projects (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source tools and developer education
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX contexts
No demonstrated knowledge of network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
Japanese language proficiency is absent; English is fluent but not sufficient without Japanese

key_factors.factor: Absence of Network Security Domain Knowledge
